case_title: FLORES, LUPE vs. CHURCH OF SCIENTOLOGY MISSION OF SAN FRANCISCO,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, LUPE AS TO DEFENDANT CHURCH OF SCIENTOLOGY MISSION OF SAN FRANCISCO, DBA SAN FRANCISCO DIANETICS CENTER AKA DIANETICS
